description: Role Summary Build scalable web apps while bringing deep, specialized expertise to either frontend or backend. Roles & Responsibilities End-to-End Development: Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications, contributing to both server-side and client-side architecture. Specialized Focus: Leverage your core strength in either frontend UI/UX or backend architecture to drive the quality and direction of the project. API & Integration: Develop secure, high-performance APIs and ensure seamless data flow between the backend services and frontend interfaces. Database Management: Design database schemas, write efficient queries, and optimize performance for scalable data storage and retrieval. Collaboration & Quality: Work closely with product and design teams, write clean and maintainable code, and participate in peer code reviews. Requirements Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field. Experience: Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer. Strong, specialized expertise leaning towards either Front End or Back End development is highly preferred. Frontend Skills: Proficiency in modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Vue.js, or Angular), JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3. Backend Skills: Solid experience with backend languages (e.g., Node.js, Python, C#, or Java) and relational/NoSQL databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB). Tools & Methodologies: Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), and agile development processes. Benefits 13-Month Salary: Guaranteed additional month of base salary. Yearly Performance Bonus: Rewarded annually based on individual and company achievements. Monthly Transport Allowance: Financial support to cover daily commuting expenses. Monthly Rental Subsidies: Monthly allowance provided to support your housing and accommodation needs. How to Proceed If you are ready to take on this exciting role, please apply by clicking [Apply / Apply Now] . Please note: Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
